web_results.title: 7 most likely GOP successors to Trump in 2028
web_results.description: Youngkin notably did not stump alongside Trump during the election as Democrats sought to tie him to the former president. Trump formally backed Youngkin for the role. However, Youngkin, 58, has since built ties with Trump on and off of the campaign trail. The two leaders appeared together in public for the first time in June as polls showed Trump gaining steam in Virginia, a state that has been reliably blue at the presidential level in recent elections.
